testcase.name: andOperatorFalseWhenEitherSideFalse

failure.message: 'A and B' should be false when B is false. Expression: 'aa == a and ab == b'

timestamp = 2026-06-19T20:43:21.461125100, ConditionEvaluatorPropertyTest:andOperatorFalseWhenEitherSideFalse = java.lang.AssertionError: 'A and B' should be false when B is false. Expression: 'aa == a and ab == b'
|-----------------------jqwik----------------------- tries = 92 | # of calls to property checks = 81 | # of not rejected calls generation = RANDOMIZED | parameters are randomly generated after-failure = SAMPLE_FIRST | try previously failed sample, then previous seed when-fixed-seed = ALLOW | fixing the random seed is allowed edge-cases#mode = MIXIN | edge cases are mixed in edge-cases#total = 100 | # of all combined edge cases edge-cases#tried = 11 | # of edge cases tried in current run seed = -5327657390609570574 | random seed to reproduce generated values
Shrunk Sample (21 steps) ------------------------ varA: "aa" varB: "ab" valA: "a" valB: "b" wrongVal: "b"
Original Sample --------------- varA: "l5xwl" varB: "dlz9mvn" valA: "kvMNYz" valB: "9" wrongVal: "9"
Original Error -------------- java.lang.AssertionError: 'A and B' should be false when B is false. Expression: 'l5xwl == kvMNYz and dlz9mvn == 9'
